hero.title: Expert Care for Your Beloved Companions
hero.subtitle: Where advanced veterinary medicine meets compassionate service. State-of-the-art facilities, experienced veterinarians, and a genuine love for animals.

announcement.text: Vaccine batch arriving next week! Pre-book your pet's vaccination slots now.

consultation.title: General Consultation & Surgery
consultation.description: Comprehensive health examinations, diagnostic services, and advanced surgical procedures. Our sterile operating theater is equipped with modern monitoring equipment and staffed by experienced veterinary surgeons.

boarding.title: Pet Boarding & Daycare
boarding.description: Luxurious accommodations for your pets while you're away. Climate-controlled suites, supervised play areas, and personalized care. Cats and dogs are housed separately for stress-free stays.

vaccination.title: Vaccination & Wellness
vaccination.description: Keep your pets protected with comprehensive vaccination programs. Our wellness packages include preventive care, parasite control, and nutritional counseling.

boarding.slots: 3 cat slots available for this weekend. Book early to secure your spot!

contact.address: 123 Jalan Pet Care, Taman Animalia, 50000 Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
